headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Jack Henry & Associates, Lowers Price Target to $173
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Daniel R. Perlin   maintains Jack Henry & Associates (NASDAQ:JKHY) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $180 to $173.
